caption: A man with a tall, pointed grey wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a small red bow tie. He wears large black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a black vest. A yellow "LEE" brand banner is visible in the background. Across the bottom of the scene, a logo appears containing the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth as if speaking while looking toward the left of the frame. The background remains static throughout the sequence, with no other people visible.
